scripts.start:auto: powershell -Command "$ip = (Get-NetRoute -DestinationPrefix '0.0.0.0/0' | Sort-Object RouteMetric | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { (Get-NetIPAddress -InterfaceIndex $_.InterfaceIndex -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -notlike '169.254*' } | Select-Object -First 1).IPAddress }); $env:REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME = $ip; $env:EXPO_PUBLIC_BANK_BACKEND_URL = 'http://' + $ip + ':4000'; Write-Host ('Using packager host: ' + $env:REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME); Write-Host ('Using backend: ' + $env:EXPO_PUBLIC_BANK_BACKEND_URL); npx expo start --lan -c"
